data.title: Update planned epics and stories to reflect refactored script locations and APIs
data.description:
## Overview

As part of this epic, several Python scripts are being extracted into subpackages and shell scripts are having utility functions relocated. Any existing planned (open, not yet in-progress) epics and stories that reference these scripts by path or import may become inaccurate.

## Scope

Audit open epics and stories (not yet in-progress) for references to the following relocated scripts and update their descriptions, file paths, and acceptance criteria to use the new locations:

- `plugins/dso/scripts/analyze-tool-use.py` → `plugins/dso/scripts/analyze_tool/` subpackage
- `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-graph.py` → `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_graph/` subpackage
- `plugins/dso/scripts/bridge-inbound.py` / `bridge-outbound.py` → `plugins/dso/scripts/bridge/` subpackage
- `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-reducer.py` → `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_reducer/` subpackage
- Any shell utility functions extracted from oversized shell scripts (as completed by 6cc1-c200)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All open epics that reference relocated scripts by path are updated to use the new paths
- [ ] All open stories under those epics that reference relocated scripts are updated
- [ ] Any acceptance criteria or done definitions referencing old import paths are corrected
- [ ] No in-progress or closed tickets are modified
